subject: URGENT: Your account has been suspended
body: Dear Customer, Your PayPal account has been suspended due to suspicious activity. Click here immediately to verify your credentials: http://paypa1-secure.xyz/login?verify=true. Failure to act within 24 hours will result in permanent account closure.
label: phishing

subject: Aapka account band hone wala hai - Turant karwai karein
body: Priya Grahak, Aapka SBI account 24 ghante mein band ho jayega. Apna OTP share karo aur account verify karein: http://sbi-verify.net/otp-confirm. Account suspend hone wala hai, abhi action lein.
label: phishing

subject: Q4 Performance Review Schedule
body: Hi Team, Please find attached the Q4 performance review schedule. Reviews will be conducted between January 20-31. Please confirm your availability by replying to this email. Best regards, HR Team
label: safe

subject: Immediate Action Required - Account Verification
body: Your HDFC Bank account requires immediate verification. Your account will be blocked if you do not update your KYC within 48 hours. Login now: http://hdfc-secure-login.tk/verify-kyc
label: phishing

subject: Your order has been shipped
body: Hello, Your order #123-456-789 has been shipped and will arrive by January 18. Track your package at amazon.com/orders. Thank you for shopping with us.
label: safe

subject: உங்கள் கணக்கு சரிபார்க்கப்பட வேண்டும்
body: அன்புள்ள வாடிக்கையாளர், உங்கள் ICICI வங்கி கணக்கு சரிபார்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். உடனடியாக உங்கள் OTP மற்றும் கடவுச்சொல்லை உள்ளிடவும்: http://icici-verify.net/tamil-login
label: phishing

subject: Your ticket booking confirmation
body: Dear Passenger, Your ticket for train 12345 from Delhi to Mumbai on 20-Jan-2024 has been confirmed. PNR: 1234567890. Please carry a valid ID proof during travel.
label: safe

subject: Congratulations! You won Rs 50 Lakhs
body: You have been selected as the winner of India National Lottery 2024. To claim your prize of Rs 50,00,000 please provide your bank account details and pay processing fee of Rs 5000 at: http://lottery-winner-india.com/claim
label: phishing

subject: మీ ఖాతా నిలిపివేయబడుతుంది - వెంటనే చర్య తీసుకోండి
body: గౌరవనీయమైన కస్టమర్, మీ Axis Bank ఖాతా 24 గంటల్లో నిలిపివేయబడుతుంది. మీ OTP మరియు పాస్‌వర్డ్ ఇప్పుడే నమోదు చేయండి: http://axis-kyc.xyz/telugu-verify
label: phishing

subject: Your Microsoft 365 subscription renewal
body: Your Microsoft 365 subscription will renew on February 1, 2024. No action is required. Your payment method on file will be charged. To manage your subscription, visit account.microsoft.com.
label: safe
